case_title: RUI XIA WU VS. SHE H. HSIEH

CANTONESE INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VAMTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, RUI XIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSIEH, SHE H. $926.48 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $926.48, SECURITY DEPOSIT 500.00. INTEREST ON DEPOSIT PER SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE $226.48. $200.00 PENALTY FOR FAILURE TO RETURN DEPOSIT OR ACCOUNT FOR IT AS REQUIRED BY CALIFORNIA LAW. NO DEDUCTION MADE FOR UNPAID RENT AS TESTIMONY REVEALS PLAINITFF CHARGED ILLEGAL RENT INCREASE IN VILOATION OF SAN FRANCIDCO RENT ORDINANCE FOR 2 YEARS.
